name: Fresca Cake with Maraschino Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Cream together sugar, butter, and shortening.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add flour and Fresca alternately with baking powder.
5. When mixture is fully creamed, add vanilla and fruit rinds.
6. Pour batter into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch cake pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a cake tester comes out clean.
Icing:
1. Mix egg whites, sugar, water, Maraschino cherry juice, light corn syrup, and cream of tartar in a double boiler.
2. Beat constantly until the mixture is thick and spreadable.
3. Frost the cooled cake.
4. Decorate the top with chopped Maraschino cherries or gum drops.
Note: Since Fresca may be unavailable, 7-Up can be used as a substitute. Also, if the problem with the cherries has been resolved, dark cherry syrup from a can can replace the Maraschino cherry syrup.
